h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to follow the step-by-step instructions to set up and verify the 3/4 time signature.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner only performs highly scaffolded, repetitive actions without demonstrating any independent actional breakthrough.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor maintains the same highly structured, repetitive scaffolding throughout, as there is no learner resistance or breakdown.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn, so the tutor does not adapt to any revised framing.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to place the remaining labels and arrows on the cart diagram as instructed.

scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutoring session proceeds smoothly without any learner resistance or breakdown that would trigger a tutor reversal.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.
